name: content
seoTitle: Iconic Harry Potter Film Locations - An Itinerary
seoDescription: It was in Scotland's capital city that JK Rowling started to plot the adventures
teaser: It was in Scotland's capital city that JK Rowling started to plot the adventures of Harry and his friends

introduction.value: It was in Scotland's capital city that JK Rowling started to plot the adventures of Harry and his friends. With cobbled streets, winding alleys and medieval architecture, the city certainly have a few things in common with the settings from the books and films. She wrote the early chapters in various cafés around the city's Old Town, before coming back to finish off the series from a peaceful suite in The Balmoral Hotel. It is also said that Hogwarts School was styled on Edinburgh’s Fettes College, a private school on the outskirts of Edinburgh’s west end new town. You could also try the Wizarding World of Edinburgh tour.

title: Harry Potter film and book locations itinerary
